items.title: 'We are at the edge of a battlefield': BBC reports near Strait of Hormuz
items.dek: The BBC's Orla Guerin travels to the edge of the critical waterway that Iran has put a stranglehold on.
items.body: The BBC's Orla Guerin travels to the edge of the critical waterway that Iran has put a stranglehold on.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump issues expletive-laden threat to Iran over Hormuz Strait blockage
items.dek: The US president says he will destroy Iranian power plants and bridges if the vital waterway is not reopened.
items.body: The US president says he will destroy Iranian power plants and bridges if the vital waterway is not reopened.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Pope Leo XIV breaks tradition of acknowledging the Netherlands in first Easter address
